sourceInputs.candidateContribution: May supply advisory result status, finding counts, changed-file observations, and non-enforcement metadata for future proposal generation.
sourceInputs.authorityBoundary: Advisory scope output is not graph-source authority, approval, runtime Evidence satisfaction, enforcement, or graph delta apply.

sourceInputs.candidateContribution: May provide a human-readable runtime report link candidate.
sourceInputs.authorityBoundary: The report is review context only and is not accepted Evidence or approval.
Changed-file collection is not scope compliance, graph delta capture, or graph update proposal generation.

sourceInputs.candidateContribution: May provide advisory scope-finding review note and risk update candidates.
Defines non-apply and human-review boundaries that future generation must preserve.
sourceInputs.authorityBoundary: Boundary preview is not a graph update proposal.

sourceInputs.candidateContribution: Maps advisory candidate concepts to existing devview-graph-update-proposal-v0 fields.
sourceInputs.authorityBoundary: Schema alignment does not generate proposal objects.

sourceInputs.candidateContribution: Provides sourceRecordId candidate, graphDeltaPath deferral, and Evidence/report link handling decisions.
sourceInputs.authorityBoundary: Mapping decisions do not approve graph changes or apply deltas.

sourceRecordIdentity.forbiddenInterpretation: CH-001 remains a review candidate only. It is not an apply-ready operation-chain record, fixture approval, graph-source mutation, runtime Evidence satisfaction, or source-authority promotion.

graphDeltaPathPolicy.reason: The output convention is candidate-only because this task does not create a graph-delta-v0 artifact or a devview-graph-update-proposal-v0 artifact.
graphDeltaPathPolicy.forbiddenInterpretation: This source artifact is not itself graphDeltaPath for an apply-ready proposal and does not authorize graph-source writes.

evidenceAndReportLinkCandidates.forbiddenInterpretation: Candidate links are not accepted Evidence, runtime Evidence satisfaction, graph update approval, fixture approval, or user acceptance.

proposalV0InputAlignment.notes: The current proposal-only generator leaves changedFiles empty and preserves changed-file observations as candidate context until graphDeltaPath policy is selected.
Advisory findings may inform remainingRisks or nextAllowedActions only after human review.
CH-001 is structure-only review context, not an apply-ready node update target.
The existing proposal schema does not yet define a dedicated Evidence or runtime report link field.
Proposal-only generation must preserve proposal-only, not-applied, not-approved, and human-review-required boundaries.

futureGeneratorScopeDecision.reviewPacketBoundary: The review packet consumes an explicit proposal-only preview output and remains review input only; it does not record approval or human decisions.
futureGeneratorScopeDecision.devViewCodexHookGatewayBoundary: The hook gateway boundary is a future activation/routing preview for DevView ON sessions; it is not implemented hook automation, graph-source mutation, graph delta apply, approval, or runtime Evidence satisfaction.

allowedUse: serve as the proposal-only generator input shape
collect advisory check-scope, compact report, changed-file collection, evaluation, boundary, schema alignment, and mapping decision references
preserve CH-001 as a structure-only sourceRecordId candidate requiring human review
record Evidence/report link candidates without accepting them as Evidence
align future generation input with devview-graph-update-proposal-v0 fields
link to the DevView Codex Hook Gateway boundary as a later activation preview without treating it as generator input authority
nonExecutionBoundary: This artifact is the graph-delta-compatible source input shape for the proposal-only generator. It is not graph-source, not a graph-delta-v0 artifact, not a devview-graph-update-proposal-v0 artifact, and not graph delta apply. The generator emits graph-delta-proposal-only-preview JSON without mutating graph-source, approving graph updates, enforcing scope, rejecting diffs, satisfying runtime Evidence, proving equivalence, configuring CI or required checks, changing branch protection, or replacing human review. The Human Review Packet surface consumes explicit proposal preview output only and does not record approval, record human decisions, or replace human review. The DevView Codex Hook Gateway boundary is linked only as a future activation/routing preview; it does not implement hook scripts or blocking behavior.
